tree.name: Asa Newell
tree.narrative: **Asa Newell** came to Atlanta in a draft-night swap with New Orleans. The Hawks used their own #13 pick on **Derik Queen**, then immediately flipped him to the Pelicans for Newell and a 2026 first-round pick — turning one pick into a player they preferred plus future draft capital.
tree.tradeDescription: Hawks traded Derik Queen to Pelicans for Asa Newell and a 2026 1st round draft pick (most favorable of NOP and MIL).
tree.note: Forward acquired on draft night in exchange for the #13 pick Derik Queen.

assetsGivenUp.name: Derik Queen
assetsGivenUp.narrative: Atlanta's own #13 pick in the 2025 draft — **Derik Queen** out of Maryland was selected and immediately flipped to New Orleans on draft night.
assetsGivenUp.note: Hawks' own #13 pick in 2025 draft. Maryland big man, traded to NOP on draft night for Asa Newell and a 2026 1st.
